field_notes.id: The fixture uses Optional.of(UUID) to prove the official optional UUID body shape without proving resource-pack UI, removal policy, download, reload, or prompt behavior.

stop_boundary: Proves Configuration clientbound resource_pack_pop packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official present-UUID fixture only; do not infer resource-pack UI behavior, pack removal policy, download/reload behavior, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
